observationEvidence: Owner reported on 2026-07-06 that GitHub MCP/API auth was expired, preventing PRs for the stacked codex/*-v1 branches from being opened through the governed path.
notes: This record stores the last known auth observation only. It grants no permission and triggers no live calls.
Workers update this record only after a real observation: an owner report or a gated execution result.
While authStatus is expired or unknown, treat GitHub MCP execution as blocked and surface the re-auth decision to the owner.
